bead.title: Stage 2.9: Mutation resolver — documentWrite
bead.description: Implement mutation resolver for documentWrite. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_mutation_docs.go. Wire to existing handleWriteDocument which writes to s.libraryPath() (NOT .ddx/docs/). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #22.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test passes. (2) MANUAL: in GraphiQL, documentWrite a test path/content, verify via `ddx doc show <path>` OR inspect the resolved library path. The test document must be visible via both GraphQL query and CLI show.
